fields.title: Teach skill_manage to find workspace skills
fields.description: skill_manage currently scans only ~/.pi/agent/skills (or TAU_SKILLS_DIR override), so it reports `Skill '<name>' not found` for skills discovered from the current workspace such as project-local .pi/skills, working-directory skills/, ancestor .agents/skills, and tau bundled skills. Update skill lookup/mutation to use the session cwd and cover project skill discovery with regression tests.
